name: Salmon Lemon Penne
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of salted water, cook the penne for 8-10 minutes or until tender but firm.
2. In a saucepan, combine the sauce mix, milk and butter. Bring to boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and add lemon juice and rind. Cook uncovered 3-5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Combine mayonnaise and basil in a small bowl.
5. Cut salmon fillets into 3-4 portions. Brush each portion with the mayonnaise mixture.
6. Broil or grill the salmon and peppers for 5-10 minutes, turning once, until salmon starts to flake and peppers are softened.
7. Cut peppers into strips; remove skin from salmon and cut into chunks.
8. Drain pasta; return to saucepan. Add peppers and sauce, tossing well.
9. Place pasta and sauce on plate. Top with salmon. Garnish with fresh basil leaves. Serve immediately.
